name: fast-harness
description: 基于 Harness 三体架构的 Generator-Evaluator 分离多 Agent 协作开发套件。提供 implement/fix/refactor/modify 流水线命令、专职 Agent、Connector Skills 和 harness-meta-skill 扩展管理。

interface.longDescription: fast-harness installs project-local commands, agents, skills, hooks, and AGENTS.md guidance for Generator-Evaluator development workflows in Codex.
defaultPrompt: /implement 我需要实现一个新功能
